steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says some historians suggest Maya mathematicians inherited the zero symbol from the Olmec civilization. Find the choice that accurately reflects this claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Maya mathematicians acquired the zero from the Olmec: 'Acquired' matches 'inherited' — both mean received from a prior source. Directly supported by the passage. ✓
  • Choice B — historians respect Maya mathematicians more than Olmec mathematicians: the passage makes no comparison of respect between groups. ✗
  • Choice C — Maya mathematicians kept their achievements secret: no mention of secrecy anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — Maya mathematicians promoted the Olmec writing system: the passage is about a symbol for zero, not a writing system promotion. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
